channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: South Korea rally to beat Czechia 2-1 on World Cup opening day
item.description: Second-half goals by Oh Hyeon-gyu and Hwang In-beom steered South Korea to a win over Czechia in a Group A encounter.

item.title: Peruvian police dress as World Cup mascots to fool suspected drug dealer
item.description: Police officers in Peru dressed up as 2026 World Cup mascots as they targeted a suspected drug trafficker.

item.title: Iran weighs proposed deal but remains wary of US intentions
item.description: Iran says a proposed agreement is under review by its highest leadership and could be closer than ever before.

item.title: South Korea’s ex-President Yoon gets 30 years over drone operation
item.description: Seoul court sentences former leader for sending military drones into North Korea.

item.title: Amnesty and Oxfam warn of displacement in the occupied West Bank
item.description: Amnesty International and Oxfam released reports this week documenting a rise in state-backed Israeli settler violence.

item.title: Bosnia’s Esmir Bajraktarevic: Child of Srebrenica
item.description: As Bosnia and Herzegovina prepare to face Canada in their 2026 World Cup opener, all eyes will be on Esmir Bajraktarevic

item.title: White House shows off cage match arena as corruption lawsuit looms
item.description: White House officials previewed the grounds where they’ll host a cage match to celebrate US President Trump’s birthday.

item.title: Stock markets surge as Trump calls off strikes on Iran, touts peace deal
item.description: Wall Street and Asian markets rally on hopes for an end to the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Iran World Cup captain reveals Mexico cartel robbery story
item.description: Iran's World Cup captain says he’s heard Mexican cartels love Iranians and revealed his own brush with an armed group.

item.title: Can Africa turn its population boom into prosperity?
item.description: Africa’s rapid population growth offers major economic opportunities but also deep structural constraints.

item.title: Israel launches overnight strikes across Gaza
item.description: Videos shared by Palestinian activists show powerful Israeli airstrikes across Gaza Strip overnight.

item.title: DR Congo arrive in the US for the World Cup after Ebola quarantine
item.description: DRC squad arrived on a flight from Paris after US authorities insisted they serve a 21-day quarantine period elsewhere.

item.title: Japan’s Wataru Endo retires after injury ends World Cup 2026 dream
item.description: Midfielder and captain quits after failing to recover from foot injury ahead of Japan's game against the Netherlands.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump claims Tehran deal ‘approved’, cancels new strikes
item.description: The International Rescue Committee warns that people displaced by Israeli attacks in Lebanon are at 'breaking point'.

item.title: Who are Julian Quinones and Raul Jimenez, Mexico’s World Cup goal scorers?
item.description: Mexico's two goal scorers were overcome with emotion as they took their team to a win in the World Cup's opening game.

item.title: Trump says US and Iran have reached a ‘great settlement’
item.description: US President Donald Trump claims Washington and Tehran have reached a ‘great settlement’ and are finalising documents

item.title: Musk’s $1.8 trillion SpaceX IPO could be ‘highly undesirable’ for some
item.description: SpaceX’s IPO could challenge pension funds as concerns grow over its valuation and governance structure under Musk.

item.title: US lawmakers press Israel to let cancer patients out of Gaza for treatment
item.description: Group of lawmakers call on Trump administration to facilitate medical evacuations out of Gaza amid dearth of services.

item.title: Man pleads guilty to slaying top Democrat and her husband in Minnesota
item.description: Murder of Melissa and Mark Hortman by man disguised as police officer prompted concerns about political violence in US.

item.title: Jimenez and Quinones net as Mexico beat South Africa in World Cup opener
item.description: World Cup 2026 cohosts Mexico open the tournament with 2-0 win against South Africa, who were reduced to nine men.

item.title: World Cup mania at Mexico’s Zocalo Square
item.description: Jubilant football fans at Mexico City’s Zocalo Square are ready for the World Cup Opener at the city’s centre.

item.title: What happened, and who performed at the World Cup 2026 opening ceremony?
item.description: Musical performances, colour, and fan excitement precede the World Cup's opening game in Mexico City.

item.title: How puppets are helping women and children in Gaza cope with trauma
item.description: A puppet show project in Gaza is using storytelling and creative workshops to help women and children process trauma.

item.title: Minister condemns ‘racist thuggery’ as violence returns to Northern Ireland
item.description: The return of unrest to the province, which suffered decades of sectarian violence, has provoked deep concern.

item.title: Israel releases Hamas co-founder after two years in detention
item.description: Israeli authorities released Hamas co-founder Hassan Yousef after more than two years in administrative detention.
